name: Bhai Mohan Singh (Bombay)
body: Bhai Mohan Singh Ji hails from Sindh region in Pakistan and started his formal training of Gurmat Sangeet with Bhai Chand Ji. It was narrated to me that Bhai Mohan Singh Ji used to take foot to the mountains nearby his home and perform his daily ‘riaz’ there in solitude. He enjoyed doing this because there were no interruptions to his practice and he was able to put his full concentration into his ‘riaz’. Following the partition of Punjab, he settled in India. He formed a jatha with his brother, Bhai Puran Singh Ji who accompanied him on tabla. He was one of the first few ‘jathas’ to travel abroad and some of the recordings of his below date back to the 1960s. Among his many achievements, he has won the president prize awarded by the Kirtan Council for Gurmat Sangeet Vidhya. Bhai Mohan Singh Ji passed away due to a heart attack sometime around 1988 or 89 while attending a Kirtan program in Nagpur. If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Mohan Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
